calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Trustee To Account; To Declare Deeds Void; To Surcharge Trustee For Breach Of Trust;
Off Calendar Nov-01-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Audrey Shields, via ZOOM, for Kenneth Wicks, via ZOOM, Objector; Darren Orr and Robin Kennedy, via ZOOM, for Margaret Wicks, Petitioner.

Mr. Orr reports that he has been unable to contact his client despite several attempts to do so via email. The court asks if there is a pending conservatorship petition regarding Ms. Wicks. Ms. Shields reports that there is a pending petition in Solano county and that the petition there will not proceed until this matter is resolved and that Ms. Wicks is incapable of administering this estate. Mr. Orr advises that he is not aware of a court order determining his client's capacity and that his client moved with the intent to move back to San Francisco. The court confirms that Ms. Wicks currently resides in Benicia and thus there is a question of whether venue is proper and is considering dismissing this petition. Mr. Orr requests that the court issue an order to allow him to discuss the court's tentative with his client. The court advises that it will not issue an order to allow him to visit but asks that Ms. Shields and Mr. Wicks allow Mr. Orr access to Ms. Shields as needed.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Remove Trustee, etc., is dismissed in open court. An order re dismissal shall be prepared by the court.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
